name: shadow-editor
description: Advanced shadow editor for box-shadow and text-shadow with color picker integration, presets, and automatic theme adaptation
author: Spwig

1.0.3: Replaced native browser alert() with AdminModal for consistent admin UI
1.0.2: Fixed: Shadow editor now correctly maintains 'none' state when opening with no shadow value
Fixed: Editor no longer auto-applies default shadow on initialization
Fixed: Opening the editor no longer triggers onChange or live preview updates (only user changes do)
Fixed: Editor now re-parses shadow value from input each time it opens (catches external changes)
Fixed: addAlphaToColor now properly handles rgb() colors, not just hex
Improved: Removed hardcoded dark theme overrides in favor of CSS variables for automatic theme adaptation
1.0.1: Initial release with box-shadow and text-shadow support
